Sponsorships / Chewy

Chewy

miscellaneous
Affiliate
4% Commission
affiliate
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

Chewy is one of the biggest online retailers for pet supplies. Ranging from pet food, toys and treats to litter, aquariums and pet supplements.

Chewy Affiliate Program

Do you love pets as much as we do? Do you want to spread the word about Chewy? Get started by filling out our paw-tner application today!

Benefits

  • Earn a 4% commission on both new and existing Chewy customer orders.
  • Get 1:1 support from a dedicated in-house affiliate team.
  • Chewy stocks 2,000 + brands, featuring popular pet supplies at a great value.
  • Receive regular newsletters to keep you informed, which will share insights, opportunities, and trends. It’s free and easy to join! The affiliate program is run through Partnerize. Partnerize provides a reporting interface for you to see your orders in real time, analyze performance, pull tracking links, and optimize your program, while also facilitating commission payment.
← Back to All Sponsorships
